hub_subtitle: Business English para as reuniões com o time Global da Sanofi, congressos médicos e a apresentação de agosto

lesson.menu_title: Have You Replied Yet? -- Handling the Global Inbox on a Follow-up Call
lesson.menu_desc: Responder a fila de emails do time Global em voz alta, numa ligação de follow-up: dizer o que você JA fez, o que ACABOU de fazer e o que AINDA NAO fez -- present perfect com just, already e yet -- 34 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 15 -- Have You Replied Yet? (Present Perfect: just / already / yet)
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Emmanuele Orrico | Lesson 15 -- Have You Replied Yet? (Present Perfect: just / already / yet)
lesson.grammar_point: present perfect with just, already and yet

listenings.text: Hi Emmanuele, it's David. Just a quick voice message before our call. I've already read your report, and thank you, it looks great. I've forwarded it to the leadership team in Paris. I haven't replied to the London office yet, but I will this afternoon. One reminder: the VP has not seen the access summary yet, so please send it when it is ready. And I've just added you to the new project thread, so check your inbox. Talk soon.

Hi Emmanuele, it's Claire from the Global team. A few quick reminders before Friday. First, have you sent the final numbers yet? The VP needs them by Thursday. Second, I've just forwarded you three emails, so please reply to the first one today. It's urgent. Third, the report has an attachment, but I think it is the wrong file, so check it before you send. And do not worry about the London thread. I've already answered it for you. Thanks, and reach out if you need anything.

extra_audio.text: Hi David, let me give you a quick update. I've already sent the report to London. I've just replied to Claire's email. I haven't finished the access summary yet. And I've already set a reminder to reach out to the team.

items.situation: David asks: "Have you sent the report to the London team?"
tips: I've just sent it. It's in your inbox now.
Not yet. I haven't replied yet, but I will this morning.
Not yet. It's still a draft in my inbox.
I haven't finished it yet. I'll send it this afternoon.

items.situation: "Can you reach out to the market access team today?"
tips: Sure. I've already set a reminder.
Yes, I'll reach out to them this afternoon.
I've just downloaded the attachment. Thank you.
I've just forwarded the thread to you.
